results.name: Home page load
results.notes: Cached reload. Fresh load was 3.7s on v1.6.2.

results.name: Search (cached artist - tool)
results.notes: Tool results mostly grey placeholders for album art.

results.name: Search (fresh artist - bjork)
results.notes: 100% cover art load rate for Björk. Excellent.

results.name: Search (no results)
results.notes: Shows 'No results', no crash, no spinner stuck.

results.name: Album nav from search (OK Computer)
results.notes: Not in library, no badges (correct).

results.name: Album nav from search (Lateralus)
results.notes: Full track list, More by Tool section.

results.name: Album nav from search (Drawing Restraint 9)
results.notes: Multi-disc: tracks restart at 1 after track 11. Known bug.

results.name: Album nav from library sidebar
results.notes: Sehnsucht - all 13 MP3 badges shown. Fast.

results.name: Recently played navigation
results.notes: FAIL: Clicking recently played opened a SEARCH for 'Björk Drawing Restraint 9' instead of navigating to album view.

results.name: Back button
results.notes: Could not test - album view not reached from recently played click.

results.name: Play library track (big play button)
results.notes: Sehnsucht track 1 from library. Correct source.

results.name: Play YT preview (fresh album)
results.notes: Drawing Restraint 9 Gratitude. YT source, took ~8s to buffer.

results.name: Pause and resume
results.notes: Within 1s tolerance.

results.name: Volume control
results.notes: Not zero.

results.name: Next button (same album)
results.notes: FIXED in v1.6.3. Sehnsucht → Engel. Previously jumped to Heilung.

results.name: Previous button
results.notes: Double-prev went back correctly. Single prev restarts current (correct >3s behavior).

results.name: Auto-advance on track end
results.notes: FAIL: Pearl reached 3:43/3:43 but player paused instead of advancing to next track.

results.name: Library tracks show format badges
results.notes: Sehnsucht - all badges shown when opened from library sidebar.

results.name: Badge update after download
results.notes: FAIL: Björk tracks downloaded but album view shows 0 badges. Library API has tracks but client view is stale.

results.name: Queue persistence across nav
results.notes: Navigated to search while Sehnsucht playing — playback continued uninterrupted.

results.name: Replace queue (play different album)
results.notes: FIXED in v1.6.3. Switched Rammstein → Animals cleanly, next went to Dogs.

results.name: Play triggers download
results.notes: Björk Drawing Restraint 9 download started within 5s of play.

results.name: Upgrade auto-triggers
results.notes: Auto-queued upgrade for Björk after download. No upgrade found (expected for obscure album).

results.name: Search no results
results.notes: Shows 'No results' correctly.

results.name: Track order verification
results.notes: FAIL: Drawing Restraint 9 multi-disc — numbers restart. Known bug.

results.name: Cover art load rate
results.notes: Björk excellent, Tool poor. Art availability varies by artist on cover art APIs.

bugsFound.title: Recently played click triggers search instead of album nav
bugsFound.repro: Click album in 'Recently Played' sidebar section → opens search results instead of album view

bugsFound.title: Auto-advance fails at track end (YT preview)
bugsFound.repro: Play a YT preview track, let it reach the end → player pauses instead of advancing to next

bugsFound.title: Format badges don't appear on freshly downloaded album
bugsFound.repro: Play new album → tracks download → view album → no badges shown despite tracks in library API. Requires page refresh.

fixesVerified.title: Queue not replaced when playing album from library
fixesVerified.evidence: Telemetry shows correct track_advance: Sehnsucht→Engel, Animals→Dogs. No cross-album contamination.
